3076750.name: Captain of the Guard
3076750.description:
You have been charged with the defense of a new settlement in a hostile land. Prepare your guards and send them into battle against the horde of creatures that stalk the wilderness. As time passes and the settlement grows, so do the threats that you face.

Upgrade your guards with a unique leveling system along with a wide variety of weapons, armor, feats, and magical abilities to keep them one step ahead of danger. With randomly generated encounters, no play-through is the same, forcing you to constantly adapt to new enemies and challenges.

Manually control your guards in battle or watch them fight on their own with the auto-battler system.

How long can you survive as Captain of the Guard?

  • 300+ Enemies and Bosses

  • 70 Weapons (Swords, Daggers, Bows, Greataxes, Spears, Staves and Shields)

  • 30 Armor Sets (Cloth, Medium, Heavy)

  • 36 Unique Spells and Abilities

  • 45 Feats to Specialize each Guard

  • Randomly generated world map, encounters, and upgrades for a unique gameplay experience
